evals.name: trace-log-display
evals.prompt: Show me the traceability log from this project. I want to see what all the agents did.
evals.expected_output: Should display a chronological event timeline with icons, agent names, event types, and actions. Should handle the case where no log exists with a helpful message.

assertions.text: Attempts to load traceability-log.jsonl from platform directories
Displays events with timestamps, event types, and agent names
Provides helpful message if no trace log exists

evals.name: trace-filtered-view
evals.prompt: Show me just the decisions and reflections from the traceability log. I want to understand why certain choices were made.
evals.expected_output: Should filter trace log to show only 'decision' and 'reflection' event types.

assertions.text: Shows decision rationale and reflection outcomes
